prompt: Design for a speaking announcement poster or signboard featuring an attractive, arrogant-style anime male character as the lead. The character has a confident, charismatic, and slightly aggressive expression that draws people in. The composition faces forward or slightly at an angle, making the mouth easy to see and suitable for lip-sync animation. The character is framed from the chest or waist up with a large face. Poses include crossed arms, pointing, or a grand standing posture. Around the character, clearly arrange the [Title], [Date/Time], and [Location]. The layout should be easy to understand at a glance without too much information. The background fits the [theme/worldview]. High-quality, sophisticated anime advertising visual. Text is easy to read with emphasized key information. The atmosphere suggests the character is speaking commandingly, like 'Come here' or 'Don't miss it'. Aspect ratio is [Aspect Ratio].
